title: Practice Pointer: J-1 Research Scholar – A Misunderstood Immigration Category - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Practice Pointer: J-1 Research Scholar – A Misunderstood Immigration Category
Prepared by Amy Nice and DOS Liaison Committee member Dan Berger, this practice advisory explores the often misunderstood J-1 Research Scholar category and its role in supporting international STEM talent in the United States. The resource outlines key eligibility considerations, including research activity, program sponsorship, funding structures, and pathways for researchers working in both academic and private-sector settings.
